sessions.name: WICO
sessions.summary: WICO investigation of INC27451201 — disabled data event schedule still triggers idx jobs. Traced through AudienceService/idx code, found DisableScheduling only flags Enabled=false without removing cron trigger. Also investigated transient 502s on manual ingestion (nginx-level, self-resolved). Reviewed internal cdp-investigator plugin architecture. Awaiting customer clarification.
blockers: Waiting for Yedidyah's decision on bug vs feature request

sessions.name: Top Eleven
sessions.summary: Top Eleven session: Duek reached OVR 102 (Shooting 185). Bought Tzach Sharkat MC from auction — failed fast-trainer test, selling. Analyzed TopElevenGrandpa Campus video (46 min) — documented Perfect Conditions strategy and new daily training routine (4 video-boosted sessions on main squad after matches). Got free DR from event. Playstyle mechanics researched: no playstyle = stays forever unless coach bought.
